summary:
I have located the "needle" (the bug) and fixed it. 

The bug was caused by an out-of-sync database schema: a previous database migration (`002_rename_status.sql`) had renamed the `status` column to `order_status` in the `orders` table. However, the Go backend in `app/main.go` was still referring to the old `status` column name in both its `INSERT` (during `createOrder`) and `SELECT` (during `getOrder`) SQL queries. 

I updated both queries in `main.go` to use `order_status`, rebuilt the application binary (`orders-api`), and verified that all tests in `test.sh` now pass successfully.
